commit.subject: LU-14443 test: run review-dne-ssk
commit.message:
LU-14443 test: run review-dne-ssk

Run review-dne-ssk on top of master branch but with revert of:
b592f75446 LU-14424 Revert "LU-9679 osc: simplify osc_extent_find()"

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-ssk env=SHARED_KEY=true,ONLY=1
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Iba5e2102d56232bdc964e79b26c0aec63911df39
